title: artocarpus inconstantissimus
side_effects: Artocarpus inconstantissimus can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage and kidney problems due to its high content of toxic compounds. Moreover, people with sensitive stomachs or those taking certain medications may experience nausea, vomiting, and dizziness. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any product derived from this plant to minimize the risk of adverse reactions.
